name: CollisionDetection2d

unions.name: Container
unions.comment:
Representation of a container that stores multiple triads of a key, object, and objects' bounding box.
The type of key must be comparable.

values.name: collideWith
values.comment:
Return pairs of key and object which satisfy conditions
that an objects' bounding box share some points with a given bounding box as a second argument
and a result of a first argument is `True`.

    circleA =
        Circle2d.atPoint (Point2d.pixels 80 80) (pixels 15)

    circleB =
        Circle2d.atPoint (Point2d.pixels 60 60) (pixels 20)

    container =
        emptyContainer |> insert "a" circleA |> insert "b" circleB

    collideWith (Circle2d.centerPoint >> Point2d.equalWithin (pixels 10) (Point2d.pixels 50 50)) someBox container
        == [ { key = "b", object = circleB } ]
values.type: (object -> Basics.Bool) -> boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> List.List { key : comparable, object : object }

values.name: customQuadTree
values.comment:
You can specify a depth of the quadtree and width and height of most leaf-level cells.
A value of depth must be equal to or larger than 2.
values.type: { extrema : boundingBox -> { minX : Basics.Float, minY : Basics.Float, maxX : Basics.Float, maxY : Basics.Float }, intersects : boundingBox -> boundingBox -> Basics.Bool, getBoundingBox : object -> boundingBox, boundary : CollisionDetection2d.Boundary, depth : Basics.Int, cellWidth : Basics.Int, cellHeight : Basics.Int } -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: detectCollisions
values.comment:
Detect collisions.
A first argument is a function to check a collision with objects.

    circleA =
        Circle2d.atPoint (Point2d.pixels 80 80) (pixels 15)

    circleB =
        Circle2d.atPoint (Point2d.pixels 60 60) (pixels 20)

    circleC =
        Circle2d.atPoint (Point2d.pixels 200 200) (pixels 5)

    container =
        emptyContainer |> insert "a" circleA |> insert "b" circleB |> insert "c" circleC

    check objA objB =
        Point2d.equalWithin
            (Quantity.plus (Circle2d.radius objA) (Circle2d.radius objB))
            Circle2d.centerPoint objA
            Circle2d.centerPoint objB

    detectCollisions check container
            == [ ({ key = "a", object = circleA }, { key = "b", object = circleB } ]
values.type: (object -> object -> Basics.Bool) -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> List.List ( { key : comparable, object : object }, { key : comparable, object : object } )

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only objects which passed the given test.
values.type: (comparable -> object -> Basics.Bool) -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Foldl. It is equivalent to `toDict |> Dict.foldl`
values.type: (comparable -> object -> a -> a) -> a -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> a

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Foldr. It is equivalent to `toDict |> Dict.foldr`
values.type: (comparable -> object -> a -> a) -> a -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> a

values.name: get
values.comment: Get an object from a container if it exists.
values.type: comparable -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> Maybe.Maybe object

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert key and object to a container.
values.type: comparable -> object -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: keys
values.comment: Get all keys in a container.
values.type: CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> List.List comparable

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply functions to all objects in a container.
values.type: (comparable -> object -> object) -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: naive
values.comment: Construct a container that check all combinations of objects to detect collisions.
values.type: { extrema : boundingBox -> { minX : Basics.Float, minY : Basics.Float, maxX : Basics.Float, maxY : Basics.Float }, intersects : boundingBox -> boundingBox -> Basics.Bool, getBoundingBox : object -> boundingBox } -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: quadTree
values.comment:
Construct a container that uses a quadtree algorithm to detect collisions.
The field `extrema` of the first argument is a function that extracts parameters from a bounding box
to register an object to each cell of the quadtree.
The filed `boundary` represents a range of x and y coordinates.
You can use any type for both `boundingBox` and `object`.
For instance, if you use ianmackenzi/elm-geometry, the function is called like the following.

    import Circle2d exposing (Circle2d)
    import BoundingBox2d exposing (BoundingBox2d)
    import Pixels exposing (inPixels, Pixels)

    extrema =
        BoundingBox2d.extrema
        >> (\r -> { minX = inPixels r.minX, minY = inPixels r.minY, maxX = inPixels r.maxX, maxY = inPixels r.maxY })

    quadTree
        { extrema = extrema
        , intersects = BoundingBox2d.intersects
        , getBoundingBox = Circle2d.boundingBox
        , boundary = { minX = 0, minY = 0, maxX = 200, maxY = 200 }
        }
        == Container key (Circle2d Pixels SomeCoordinates) (BoundingBox2d Pixels SomeCoordinates)
values.type: { extrema : boundingBox -> { minX : Basics.Float, minY : Basics.Float, maxX : Basics.Float, maxY : Basics.Float }, intersects : boundingBox -> boundingBox -> Basics.Bool, getBoundingBox : object -> boundingBox, boundary : { minX : Basics.Float, minY : Basics.Float, maxX : Basics.Float, maxY : Basics.Float } } -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: remove
values.comment: Update an object from a container if it exists.
values.type: comparable -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: size
values.comment: Returns number of objects a container stores.

values.name: toDict
values.type: CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> Dict.Dict comparable object

values.name: update
values.comment: Update an object if it exists.
values.type: comparable -> (Maybe.Maybe object -> Maybe.Maybe object) -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all objects in a container.
values.type: CollisionDetection2d.Container comparable object boundingBox -> List.List object
